caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I DON NEVER DO SHIT" and a green baseball cap with headphones is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is seated in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs on the walls and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt in the background. A clothing rack with various garments is visible behind him. In the lower-left and lower-right corners of the scene, there are logos, one of which includes the text "BODELLY". Throughout the sequence, the man's expression and head position shift as he speaks; he starts by looking down and then transitions to looking forward and slightly to his left, speaking with a smile. The camera remains stationary, capturing him from the chest up as he interacts with someone off-screen.
